name: portico
description: Cross-platform desktop SSH terminal with local-image-paste-into-remote-AI bridge.

scripts.pack:stable: cross-env PORTICO_RELEASE_CHANNEL=stable electron-vite build && cross-env PORTICO_RELEASE_CHANNEL=stable electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --dir
scripts.pack:beta: cross-env PORTICO_RELEASE_CHANNEL=beta electron-vite build && cross-env PORTICO_RELEASE_CHANNEL=beta electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --dir
scripts.dist:stable: cross-env PORTICO_RELEASE_CHANNEL=stable electron-vite build && cross-env PORTICO_RELEASE_CHANNEL=stable electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.dist:beta: cross-env PORTICO_RELEASE_CHANNEL=beta electron-vite build && cross-env PORTICO_RELEASE_CHANNEL=beta electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs
